content.content:
=== PLAN ===
Pascal compiler (p24p) for COR24 targeting the pv24a p-code VM. C compiler via tc24r for the compiler itself, Pascal runtime written in Pascal (dogfooded). Phase 0: expression language compiler in C (integers, booleans, assignment, if/while, writeln). Phase 1: block structure compiler in C (procedures, functions, arrays, records, var params, nested scopes, for/repeat/case, read/readln). Phase 1 runtime: rewrite runtime in Pascal (I/O formatting, standard functions, diagnostics). Pipeline: .pas → p24p (C, native) → .spc → pasm → .p24 → pv24a VM.

=== STEPS ===
  [x] 001-pascal-subset-spec [production]: Define the Phase 0 Pascal subset grammar and .spc emission spec. Create docs/...
  [x] 002-002-lexer [legacy]: Implement the Phase 0 lexer in C. Create src/lexer.c and src/lexer.h. The lex...
  [x] 003-003-parser [production]: Implement the Phase 0 parser in C. Create src/parser.c and src/parser.h. The ... <-- YOU ARE HERE

=== CURRENT STEP: 003-003-parser [production] ===
Status: completed
Description: Implement the Phase 0 parser in C. Create src/parser.c and src/parser.h. The ...

=== PROMPT ===
Implement the Phase 0 parser in C. Create src/parser.c and src/parser.h. The parser consumes tokens from the lexer and builds an AST (or directly emits p-code — choose the simpler approach for Phase 0). Implement parsing for: program declaration, const/var declarations with types (integer, boolean), begin/end blocks, assignment statements (:=), expressions (arithmetic: +, -, *, div, mod; comparison: =, <>, <, >, <=, >=; boolean: and, or, not), if/then/else, while/do, writeln with multiple arguments. Use recursive descent. Report syntax errors with line numbers. Include a test program (tests/test_parser.c) that parses a small Pascal program and prints the parse tree or emitted p-code. Verify it compiles with tc24r and runs on cor24-run.

=== WHEN DONE ===
Run: agentrail begin    (if not yet started)
Run: agentrail complete --summary "what you did" --next-slug <slug> --next-prompt "next instructions"
  Or: agentrail complete --summary "what you did" --done   (if this is the last step)
